topic: The word HELLO appears in the steam on my bathroom mirror every morning and I shower alone
title: The Word HELLO Appears in the Steam on My Bathroom Mirror Every Morning | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Words appear in the steam on my bathroom mirror after I shower. I shower alone.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a fogged bathroom mirror with the letters of a word faintly visible drawn through the condensation, dim bathroom light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Small windowless bathroom. Electric extractor fan above the toilet.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a small windowless bathroom with a sink and mirror visible and an extractor fan grille on the ceiling, dim overhead light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a chrome shower head with water beading on the underside, dim bathroom light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Noticed last December. A single curled line across the mirror.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a fogged bathroom mirror with one curving line drawn through the condensation across its surface, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
wide shot of a small bathroom with a fully fogged mirror visible above the sink, dim overhead light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Not random. Formed letters. Finger drag pattern across the glass.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a fogged bathroom mirror showing five clear letters drawn through the condensation visibly in finger width strokes, dim bathroom light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a smartphone held up to photograph a fogged bathroom mirror, only the hand and phone visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Same word. Different orientation each day. The word was HELLO.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a fogged bathroom mirror clearly showing the word HELLO drawn backwards through the condensation, dim bathroom light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Turned the extractor fan on full. Ran the shower cold.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small bathroom with steam clearly being pulled toward a ceiling fan grille, the mirror only lightly fogged, dim overhead light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Less steam. The word appeared anyway. In a colder droplet pattern.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a barely fogged bathroom mirror with the word HELLO visible in a pattern of tiny water droplets across its surface, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
wide interior of a public gym locker room with a row of shower stalls and a long mirror above the sinks, dim fluorescent light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Came home Saturday. Bathroom mirror dry. The word is etched into the silver backing. Permanent.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a dry bathroom mirror with the letters of a word visibly etched into the silver coating behind the glass, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
